title: 留心笔记
subTitle: 雁过留声，风过留痕
allHead: <script src='../assets/RonanTheme.js'></script><script src='../assets/GmeekVercount.js'></script><script async src='https://cdn.seline.com/seline.js' data-token='980dcab9ed188b4'></script><script　src='https://app.rybbit.io/api/script.js'　data-site-id='07c1f2ea718b'　defer></script><script async src='https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-9661896697976587' crossorigin='anonymous'></script>
indexScript: <script src='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.js' data-cat='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.gif'></script><script>var itemsPerPage=10;var custompages=0;var xmlUrl=window.location.origin+'/rss.xml';function getCurrentPage(){const m=window.location.href.match(/page(\d+)\.html/);return m?parseInt(m[1]):1}function appendPageLink(p,n,c){var l=document.createElement('a');l.href=n===1?window.location.origin:window.location.origin+'/page'+n+'.html';l.textContent=n;if(n===c)l.classList.add('current-page');p.insertBefore(l,p.children[p.children.length-1])}function appendDots(p){var d=document.createElement('span');d.textContent='...';p.insertBefore(d,p.children[p.children.length-1])}function updatePagination(t,c){var p=document.querySelector('.pagination');if(p){while(p.children.length>2)p.removeChild(p.children[1]);if(t<=10){for(var i=1;i<=t;i++)appendPageLink(p,i,c)}else{appendPageLink(p,1,c);appendPageLink(p,2,c);appendPageLink(p,3,c);if(c>5)appendDots(p);var s=Math.max(4,c-2);var e=Math.min(t-3,c+2);for(var i=s;i<=e;i++)appendPageLink(p,i,c);if(c<t-4)appendDots(p);appendPageLink(p,t-2,c);appendPageLink(p,t-1,c);appendPageLink(p,t,c)}var s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent='.pagination a.current-page{font-weight:bold;color:red;text-decoration:underline;font-size:18px;border-color:#56539d;}';document.head.appendChild(s)}}fetch(xmlUrl).then(r=>r.text()).then(d=>{var x=new DOMParser().parseFromString(d,'text/xml');var it=x.getElementsByTagName('item');var len=it.length-custompages;if(len<=itemsPerPage)return;updatePagination(Math.ceil(len/itemsPerPage),getCurrentPage())});</script>
script: <script src='../assets/ArticleTOC.js'></script><script src='../assets/lightbox.js'></script><script src='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.js' data-cat='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.gif'></script><script>document.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(anchor => {const img = anchor.querySelector('img');if (img && img.hasAttribute('data-canonical-src')) {const canonicalSrc = img.getAttribute('data-canonical-src');anchor.setAttribute('href', canonicalSrc);img.setAttribute('src', canonicalSrc);img.removeAttribute('data-canonical-src');} else {anchor.setAttribute('target', '_blank');}});</script><script>const postTitle=document.querySelector('.postTitle').textContent;fetch('../blogBase.json').then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{const posts=data.postListJson;const keys=Object.keys(posts).reverse();let index=-1;for(let i=0;i<keys.length;i++){if(posts[keys[i]].postTitle===postTitle){index=i;break;}}if(index!==-1){const nav=document.createElement('nav');nav.style.display='flex';nav.style.justifyContent='space-between';nav.style.marginTop='20px';const prev=posts[keys[index-1]];const next=posts[keys[index+1]];if(prev){const a=document.createElement('a');a.href='../'+prev.postUrl;a.innerHTML='<button class="btn" type="button">← '+prev.postTitle+'</button>';nav.appendChild(a);}else{nav.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));}if(next){const a=document.createElement('a');a.href='../'+next.postUrl;a.innerHTML='<button class="btn" type="button">'+next.postTitle+' →</button>';nav.appendChild(a);}document.getElementById('postBody').after(nav);}});</script>
